title: Lonesome Dove
author: Larry McMurtry
content: “It ain't dying I'm talking about, it's living.”

title: My Ántonia
author: Willa Cather
content: “That is happiness; to be dissolved into something complete and great.”

title: Desert Solitaire
author: Edward Abbey
content: “Wilderness is not a luxury but a necessity of the human spirit.”

title: Shane
author: Jack Schaefer
content: “A man has to be what he is, Shane. He can't break the mold.”

title: The Big Sky
author: A.B. Guthrie Jr.
content: “The land didn't care. It had been there before the white man and it would be there after him.”
